title: Florida DCF Fair Hearing Request / Appeal Form
who_uses_it: Medicaid or DCF benefit recipients requesting a fair hearing / appealing a decision.
who_signs_it: Recipient, parent, guardian, or authorized representative.
where_to_send_it: Florida DCF Office of Appeal Hearings, 2415 North Monroe St, Suite 400, Tallahassee, FL 32303-4190
extraction_notes: Official DCF Fair Hearing request form for appealing Medicaid benefit denials.

title: Florida Early Steps Referral Form
who_uses_it: Parents, pediatricians, or childcare providers referring a child under age 3 for early intervention.
who_signs_it: Referring party (parent signature preferred but not required for initial referral).
where_to_send_it: The Local Early Steps (LES) office serving the child's county.
extraction_notes: Official Early Steps Part C developmental referral intake form.

title: FLDOE ESE Special Education Mediation Request Form
who_uses_it: Parents or school districts requesting voluntary mediation to resolve special education disputes.
who_signs_it: Both parent and school district representative.
where_to_send_it: FLDOE Bureau of Exceptional Education and Student Services (BEESS), 325 W. Gaines St, Suite 614, Tallahassee, FL 32399-0400
extraction_notes: Official Florida Department of Education ESE mediation dispute request form.

title: FLDOE ESE Formal State Complaint Form
who_uses_it: Parents filing a formal state complaint alleging a violation of IDEA or state special education law.
where_to_send_it: FLDOE BEESS, 325 W. Gaines St, Suite 614, Tallahassee, FL 32399-0400
extraction_notes: Official Florida Department of Education formal ESE complaint filing template.

title: Florida Vocational Rehabilitation Pre-Employment Transition Services Application
who_uses_it: Students with disabilities ages 14-21 applying for Pre-Employment Transition Services (Pre-ETS).
where_to_send_it: Local Vocational Rehabilitation office serving the school or county.
extraction_notes: Official FL VR application packet for youth transition services.

title: ABLE United Enrollment Guide and Application
who_uses_it: Eligible individuals with disabilities setting up a tax-advantaged savings and investment account.
who_signs_it: Account owner or authorized legal representative.
where_to_send_it: Submit online at ableunited.com or mail to ABLE United, PO Box 44005, Jacksonville, FL 32231-4005
extraction_notes: Official Florida ABLE account paper application and program enrollment guidelines.
